title: ITR-3 Filing for A.Y. 2026-27 Now Enabled on E-Filing Portal
content:
# ITR-3 Filing for A.Y. 2026-27 Now Enabled on E-Filing Portal

Ek important update hai! The Income Tax Department ne Assessment Year (A.Y.) 2026-27 ke liye ITR-3 ke online filing aur Excel utility ko official e-filing portal par enable kar diya hai.

Here are the key details you should know:
*   **What's Enabled:** Online filing facility and Excel Utility for Income Tax Return Form ITR-3.
*   **Applicable For:** This is specifically for individuals and Hindu Undivided Families (HUFs) jinki income 'profits or gains of business or profession' se hoti hai.
*   **Assessment Year:** The utility is for Assessment Year 2026-27 (Financial Year 2025-26).
*   **Utility Release:** The ITR-3 Excel Utility (Version 1.0) along with the JSON Schema and Validation Rules have been released and are available for download.
*   **Date of Enablement:** This facility was made available on June 19, 2026.

Iss enablement se taxpayers, jo ITR-3 file karne ke liye eligible hain, ab apni returns prepare aur submit kar sakte hain.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Visit the Official Income Tax Department Portal for Latest Updates](https://www.incometax.gov.in)

*Published on: 22 June 2026*
